name: SecurityOfNodeSetOperationParameter
title: SecurityOfNodeSetOperationParameter
syntax: long SecurityOfNodeSetOperationParameter(char nodeName[], char networkName[], long key, qword value)
description: Sets the operation parameter value of the specified key at the specified node and network. You have to call SecurityLocalStartControlSimulationNode before this callback is called. Which and how many operation parameters exist, which values are valid for an operation parameter differs from Security Source to Security Source.
Refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about operation parameters. The manual can be opened from the Vector Security Manager on the OEM specific ribbon page.

parameters.name: char networkName[]
parameters.description: Name of the network in which the node is located.

parameters.name: long key
parameters.description: Numeric identifier of the operation parameter.

parameters.name: qword value
parameters.description: New value of the operation parameter.

return: A Value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
